_comment: Evidence vault for Salesforce -- canonical weakness/strength evidence consumed by all downstream artifacts

weaknesses.summary: Aggressive renewal price increases (15-25%) without proportional feature value. Enterprise contracts ($100K-$500K) most affected. Multiple accounts citing 'pricing shock' at renewal.
quotable_phrases: annual contract just went up 18% with no new features
saving about $120K per year on licensing alone

weaknesses.summary: Non-technical users unable to self-serve. Admin dependency creates single-point-of-failure risk. Multiple churns triggered by admin departure.
quotable_phrases: reps spend more time fighting the system than selling
no one else could manage the system without expensive consultants

weaknesses.summary: Long response times and scripted first-line agents. Enterprise accounts expect dedicated support but receiving generic responses.
quotable_phrases: long wait times and first-line agents who just read from scripts

strengths.summary: Large integration marketplace and brand recognition create meaningful switching costs.
quotable_phrases: the only thing keeping us is the integrations we've built
